message:
fix(freshness): hide RefreshIndicator timestamp in demo mode (#6263) (#6264)

Copilot's review of #6261 caught the same edge case in three cards:
when the cached hook returns `isDemoFallback: true` (or `isDemoData`
for GitOpsDrift), the cache may still hold a `lastRefresh` from a
prior live session. The RefreshIndicator would then show
"Updated X ago" — a misleading live timestamp against demo data
that isn't actually being refreshed.

Fix: pass `null` for `lastUpdated` when the demo flag is true. The
indicator still renders the refreshing spinner if demo data is
loading, but no stale timestamp.

Three cards updated:
* HardwareHealthCard
* GitOpsDrift
* DeploymentProgress

Closes #6263

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
